heading: Establishment of best practices for local, State, and Federal data collection
label: 21721 Establishment of best practices for local, State, and Federal data collection

children.text: establish best practices for data collection to focus on elder abuse; and
provide technical assistance to State, local, and tribal governments in adopting the best practices established under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Deadline
children.label: b Deadline
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Attorney General shall publish the best practices established under subsection (a)(1) on the website of the Department of Justice in a publicly accessible manner.October 18, 2017

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to require or obligate compliance with the best practices established under subsection (a)(1).
